title: salvia candollei
intro: Salvia candollei, also known as Red Salvia or Mexican Bush Sage, is a perennial shrub native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Salvia candollei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Salvia candollei can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal compounds to be harnessed and utilized in herbal remedies.
